title: 2013 Cape Horn 215 CC w/ Yamaha 250HP
description: Great condition 2013 The Yamaha LF250XCA is a 250HP, V6 4.2L with only 2000 hours counter-rotating four-stroke outboard that has been in production from at least 2011 through 2021 and later. It is not limited to a single year but represents a model series (V6 4.2L) Trolling motor All new five batteries Huge cooler. Live bait well. Audio system The 22’ hull is 1999 in great shape old school quality . Produced in Pensacola Florida. Trailer worthy with absolutely new tires. Ready to fishing The 1999 Cape Horn 22 Center Console (CC) is a rugged, unsinkable offshore fishing boat. Known for a heavy-duty, wood-free fiberglass construction and a wide beam, it handles rough water exceptionally well. Used models typically sell between \(\$ \) and \(\$ \), depending on engine condition.Key SpecificationsLength Overall: 22 feet (typically 20'8" to 22' depending on pulpit/bracket)Beam: 8 feet 6 inchesFuel Capacity: ~128 gallonsHull Construction: 12 layers of hand-laid glass, foam-filled, completely wood-freeMaximum Horsepower: Up to ~300 HP (commonly rigged with 200–250 HP outboard engines)Fishing & Design FeaturesUnsinkable Design: Features a foam-filled hull and high freeboard, making it highly regarded for safety in offshore conditions.Layout: Built as a no-nonsense fishing machine. It lacks a traditional molded inner liner in favor of raw, hose-and-go simplicity.Storage & Amenities: Includes a massive locking center console, a large bow fish box, and a spacious circular transom livewell.Market & ValuationBecause of its hardcore offshore reputation, these boats hold their value for anglers who want a durable, rough-water hull.
